subcodes.first_line: O my Persian friend! Thy letter hath been received. Thou hast chosen well the title for thy family, signifying [3.5s]... ...Thou hadst asked about the translation of the blessed verses. Translations must be of the utmost clarity and eloquence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار پارسی عبدالبهاء نامه تو رسید خوب لقبی بجهت خاندان انتخاب نمودی دلالت
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
